title: Psalms, Chapter 123
description: Complete text of Psalms chapter 123 from the King James Version (1611).
introduction: Complete text of Psalms chapter 123 from the King James Version (1611).

translation.text:
<sup>1</sup>Unto thee lift I up mine eyes, O thou that dwellest in the heavens. <sup>2</sup>Behold, as the eyes of servants
look unto the hand of their masters,
and as the eyes of a maiden unto the hand of her mistress; so our eyes
wait upon the LORD our God, until that he have mercy upon us. <sup>3</sup>Have mercy upon us, O LORD, have mercy upon us: for we are exceedingly filled with contempt. <sup>4</sup>Our soul is exceedingly filled with the scorning of those that are at ease,
and with the contempt of the proud.
